summary:
# Belgian Grand Prix Preview

Lewis Hamilton seeks to build momentum at Spa after igniting Ferrari's championship hopes with his stunning victory in Spain, while Max Verstappen aims to reassert Red Bull's dominance on a circuit that has favored high-speed machinery. McLaren's resurgent pace threatens to disrupt the Verstappen-Hamilton narrative, with Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris capable of challenging for poles and podiums at the high-speed Belgian track. A strong result for Hamilton would signal Ferrari's emergence as genuine title contenders heading into the second half of the season, potentially reshaping the championship battle as Verstappen's points cushion comes under pressure.
